name: Silver Standard Resources Inc.
description: SSR Mining Inc. is a leading, free cash flow focused gold company with a diversified portfolio of high-quality assets. The company engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of precious metal resource properties, including gold, silver, copper, lead, and zinc. With producing assets located in the United States, Türkiye, Canada, and Argentina, SSR Mining maintains a global pipeline of development and exploration projects. Headquartered in Denver, Colorado, the company is incorporated in British Columbia, Canada, and is committed to delivering operational excellence and sustainable value across its international mining operations.
